title: ligustrum vulgare subsp. italicum
intro: Ligustrum vulgare subsp. italicum, also known as Privet, is a plant species native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, which include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Ligustrum vulgare subsp. italicum is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and well-being.
